human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text and user-pasted Drop text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute acti

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text and user-pasted Drop text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute acti

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text and user-pasted Drop text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute acti

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text and user-pasted Drop text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute acti

scenario_results.notes: UI exposes nine visible Artifact/Search/Evidence/Claim/Action/Dry-run/Approval/Execution/Audit steps, not only one opaque run button.
Artifact step shows artifact ID, checksum, source, derived status, evidence refs, and audit refs.
Search step shows query, result snippet, search snapshot ID, and evidence eligibility.
Evidence step shows supporting evidence and insufficient-evidence guidance.
Claim step shows Draft, Evidence-backed, and Approved states clearly.
Zero-evidence Claim approval is denied with CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED and resolution guidance.
Action Card shows diff, expected impact, evidence, policy, risk, approval state, mock/local boundary, and rollback/compensation note.
Execution step shows mock_connector_calls=1 and real_external_http_calls=0.
Audit step shows artifact/search/evidence/claim/action/approval/execution events and successful audit verification.
UI states local VS0 proof only and does not claim production release, live connector readiness, or human acceptance.

scenario_results.notes: VS4 parent contract, matrix, Slice 001 through Slice 024 contracts, active proof paths, return-to-work lineage guard, report/package integrity guard, active report/package coherence guard, and the VS4-specific scenario gate are structurally verified.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if contract and matrix are internally consistent and status-neutral; FAIL on duplicate IDs, missing criteria, count mismatch, or implementation PASS claim.

scenario_results.notes: Memory/Wiki candidate is draft, inspectable, evidence-backed, and not owner-approved.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Memory candidate is visible and reviewable; FAIL if durable memory is hidden.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Draft memory cannot influence answers or actions, is not hidden durable memory, unsafe Ask text creates zero durable memory side effects across CLI and HTTP/API paths, and unauthorized Action approval remains pending.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if pre-approval memory does not become approved truth; FAIL on silent memory write or hidden profiling.

scenario_results.notes: Action Card review includes goal, why/evidence, dry-run, policy, risk, approval, local activity, denied-until-authorized detail, safety envelope detail, wrapped long reason codes, and keyboard-reachable detail from the normal Actions nav page.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if user can understand action before approval; FAIL if action appears as magic automation.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Action path uses mock ConnectorHub boundary with real_external_http_calls=0, exposes the no-live-writeback boundary on the Actions nav page, wraps long no-live-writeback and denial text, and proves denied execution/approval plus unsafe HTTP Ask promotion create no provider, workflow, or live writeback side effects.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if no live writeback is claimed or performed; FAIL on hidden or implied live external send.

scenario_results.notes: Ops Inbox shows needs-review, approval request, policy-blocked, and failed-with-recovery triage lanes, selected-item detail, lane filtering, row click selection, keyboard selection, pending brief, evidence gap, claim, memory, action, Learn, Evidence/Audit detail path, human-review handoff, activity follow-up rows, valid Continue targets, CLI mission-control selected-item projection, loop-view journey parity, and Ask-created work kind alignment.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if the product supports returning daily work; FAIL if only one-shot demo flow exists.

evidence: cornerstone artifact/search/evidence/brief/claim/memory/mission/action/audit CLI transcripts for three packs
cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Ask uses the user's question and pasted source context to create a conversation-backed answer and reviewable Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, evidence, and audit refs from a labeled keyboard-runnable control, while unsafe Ask text stays evidence-only and cannot become authority through CLI or HTTP/API promotion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Ask can promote durable work with evidence; FAIL if it is generic chatbot output with no durable loop.

scenario_results.notes: Workspace and owner context are visible in the shell, Ops Inbox selected-item detail, and VS4-H01 review handoff.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if context is visible and scoped; FAIL if user cannot tell which workspace informs results/actions.

scenario_results.notes: Normal-user UI uses Source, Evidence-backed Brief, Ops Inbox triage, Evidence/Audit, Claim candidate, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, Learn review, Product Alpha review, and Activity record language before proof jargon or raw object IDs in normal and focus order.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if normal user can work without scenario/verifier/engine jargon; FAIL if internal proof language dominates.

scenario_results.notes: Major Product Alpha surfaces expose empty, loading, ready, partial/degraded, needs-review, permission denied, policy blocked, failed-with-recovery, audit/log, and human-review-required states without a keyboard trap; Ops Inbox triage, Evidence/Audit detail, and human handoff make needs-review, policy-blocked, failed recovery, audit/log, and H01 review observable.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if required states are covered for major pages; FAIL if failure or blocked states are absent or misleading.

scenario_results.notes: Claim and Action references align to the runtime Brief detail design with labeled trust/action detail, denied Action boundary detail, contained long tokens, and normal nav destinations, without using reference images as PASS evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if implementation behavior and UI align with references; FAIL if images are treated as implementation evidence.

scenario_results.notes: VS4 shell, Claim page, Action page, Evidence/Audit detail, human-review handoff, unsafe HTTP boundary proof, and browser proof do not claim production, on-prem, final security, live-provider, accessibility certification, or human UX readiness; desktop containment does not hide denied Action zero-provider/writeback side-effect evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if forbidden readiness claims are absent or historical/deferred; FAIL on unqualified readiness claim.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Prompt-injection fixture, same-checksum user-paste trust downgrade, unsafe Ask text, unsafe HTTP/API promotion, unauthorized Action execution, and unauthorized Action approval are detected or denied; they create no claim approval, memory approval, action execution, external calls, policy change, or authority expansion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if untrusted content cannot create authority; FAIL on content-driven approval/action/egress.

scenario_results.notes: Reference images remain design guidance only; PASS and human-acceptance evidence comes from runtime/docs/CLI/browser proof and a dated human record.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if image references are not used as PASS proof; FAIL if image existence marks a scenario passing.

scenario_results.notes: The first screen remains product-first with user-pasted Drop/Ask source intake, readable Ask results, Ops Inbox triage, Evidence/Audit detail reached contextually, human-review handoff, product-ready Claim/Action nav destinations, and contained long policy text, while primary nav omits admin, connector, ontology, and verifier-first entries.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if default experience remains Drop / Ask / Continue; FAIL if admin or internal substrate becomes first value.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Brief detail, user text source intake, same-checksum trust downgrade, Ask injection-boundary, Ops Inbox mission-control selected-item projection, product loop-view, Action execution-boundary, Evidence/Audit audit-verify evidence, unsafe HTTP boundary browser proof, and VS4-H01 human-gate package paths have native CLI transcripts or commands with JSON output and expected negative/human-required boundaries where applicable.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if missing CLI parity blocks feature PASS; FAIL if UI/API-only feature is accepted.
